title: Evermind HTML5 App Generation Micro-Benchmark
description: 10 prompts to evaluate one-shot HTML5 app generation quality vs v0/Bolt.new/Lovable. Uses LLM-as-judge with strong external model (GPT-5 or Claude 4.6+) to avoid self-evaluation bias.

prompts.text: Build a 3D first-person shooter game in the browser. Use Three.js. Include: pointer-lock mouse look, WASD movement, left-click to shoot projectiles, 5 enemies that spawn and patrol, HUD with HP/ammo/score, game-over + restart. Single index.html, inline JS/CSS, no external assets.
Build a Snake game with Canvas. Arrow keys control, score increments per food, game over on wall/self collision, 3 difficulty levels (speed). Include pause/resume. Keep grid crisp at any window size.
Build a live Markdown editor: split pane, left is textarea, right renders HTML. Include code-block syntax highlighting, dark/light theme toggle, character count. Auto-save to localStorage.
Build a Pomodoro timer: 25 min focus, 5 min break auto-cycle, play soft beep on transition, show today's completed pomodoros from localStorage, edit goal text per session.
Build a Kanban board: 3 columns (To Do / In Progress / Done), add card, drag between columns, edit/delete card on click, persist to localStorage. Clean minimalist design.

Build an analytics dashboard: 4 KPI cards (users, revenue, orders, conversion), 1 line chart (30-day trend), 1 bar chart (top 5 products), 1 donut (traffic sources). Use Chart.js inline or pure SVG. Include date-range filter (mock data).

Build a responsive SaaS landing page: hero with CTA, 3-column feature grid, pricing table (3 tiers with highlighted middle), testimonial strip, footer. Mobile-first at 375px. Include dark mode toggle.

Build a chat UI shell: sidebar with conversation list, main pane with message bubbles (user right/AI left), input with submit + attach button, streaming typing animation on AI response (simulate with setInterval), render code blocks with syntax highlight.
Build an online whiteboard: Canvas drawing with pen+color+size, undo/redo (20 history), export PNG, clear button. Touch-enabled for mobile. Single HTML, no libraries.

Build a music visualizer: user uploads an audio file, Web Audio API extracts frequency data, Canvas renders real-time spectrum bars + floating particle system reacting to bass. Play/pause controls. Aesthetic dark theme.
